nasb.text: For as the crackling of thorn bushes under a pot, So is the laughter of the fool; And this too is futility.

esv.text: For as the crackling of thorns under a pot, so is the laughter of the fools; this also is vanity.

cnv.text: 愚昧人的笑聲， 就像鍋底下荊棘的爆聲一樣。 這也是虛空。

ccb.text: 愚人的笑声像锅底下烧荆棘的劈啪声。 这也是虚空。

csbs.text: 因为愚昧人的笑声，好像热锅下面荆棘的爆声。 这也是虚空！
